svg.title: Budget Patrol RBAC role assignment map showing which identity gets which role on which resource
svg.text: Budget Patrol — RBAC Role Assignment Map
Principle: least privilege, scoped to resource group, never subscription-wide for data access
SERVICES (mi-budgetpatrol-apps — managed identity for all microservices)
Read bank token encryption keys, API keys, connection strings
Entra auth for Postgres (no password). Transaction, budget, user, alert data
Real-time budget state: MTD per category, velocity snapshots, session cache
Agent case files, onboarding cards, profile history (MongoDB API)
Contributor (data plane read/write — separate from account management)
Managed identity gets only the roles it needs. Key Vault Secrets User (not Key Vault Admin).
Cosmos DB split: Account Reader (management) + Data Contributor (read/write). Never Owner.
Scope to resource group, not subscription
Data roles scoped to rg-bp-data. Security roles scoped to rg-bp-security. Never subscription-wide.
Exception: SP gets Contributor at subscription (needs to create resources in any RG during deployment).
Planned roles stay planned until the resource exists. No premature assignments to non-existent resources.
